data.title: Chan Mo-po: Hong Kong will publish its second policy statement on digital asset development in June
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Hong Kong SAR Financial Secretary Paul Chan said at the 2025 Caixin Summer Summit that Hong Kong has launched a licensing system for digital asset trading platforms and stablecoins, and is promoting regulatory arrangements for custody and over-the-counter transactions. "This month, we will publish the second policy statement on the development of digital assets in Hong Kong, focusing on the combination of financial services and innovation, and expanding the application scenarios of digital assets." (Shanghai Securities News)

data.title: Gate Wallet launches new BountyDrop section, unified tasks and airdrop experience fully upgraded
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News In order to improve the user experience, Gate Wallet has merged the original "Task Square" and "Airdrop" modules into BountyDrop, and launched the first ecological month event, selecting four high-quality projects of Mantle Ecological Month to be launched simultaneously: HyperPlay, Symbiosis, MOMO.FUN, Vertex, and participating in the task can unlock the airdrop reward. After the event, 1,200 participants who complete all tasks will share 12,000 MNT.
BountyDrop's new section page structure is simple and intuitive, supporting multi-chain screening, popular classification, and reward history viewing; the reward distribution process is clearer, and the user's participation status and progress are clear at a glance. BountyDrop is an airdrop task platform on Gate Wallet that is open all year round, continuously updated, and has no threshold to participate. It is committed to helping users explore the entire Web3 world efficiently with one wallet.

data.title: World Liberty Financial officially connected to OKX Wallet
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official website, World Liberty Financial has officially connected to OKX Wallet. Users will be able to seamlessly access World Liberty Financial through OKX Wallet and participate in cross-chain services such as stablecoin USD1.
It is reported that World Liberty Financial (WLF) is a decentralized financial (DeFi) platform that allows users to maximize their cryptocurrency assets through DeFi protocols. OKX Wallet is the industry's leading one-stop Web3 portal, which has supported more than 130 popular public chains and provides a seamless experience of four terminals: App, plug-in, web page and Telegram Mini wallet, creating an efficient and convenient on-chain interactive environment for users.

data.title: Ethereum Foundation Transfers 1,000 ETH to Associated Address
data.description: According to PANews, the Ethereum Foundation has internally transferred 1,000 ETH, valued at approximately $2.5 million, to an associated address identified as 0xc061...0B6d. This move was detected by PeckShield, a blockchain security firm, highlighting the ongoing activities within the Ethereum Foundation's financial operations.

data.title: BitMart June 13 Market Report: BTC fluctuated and fell during the day, and altcoins lacked market popularity
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to BitMart's market report on June 13, the total market value of the cryptocurrency market is 3.24 trillion US dollars, down 4.24% from the previous day; BTC fluctuated and fell during the day, and the current price is $103,942.39, down 3.68% in 24 hours. BTC spot ETF had a total net inflow of 79 million US dollars yesterday, and continued to achieve net inflows for 4 days; ETH plummeted during the day, and the current price is $2,501.30, down 9.77% in 24 hours. Ethereum spot ETF had a total net inflow of 112 million US dollars yesterday, and continued to have net inflows for 19 days; the rise and fall of altcoins were mixed, and the market lacked a collective narrative; the fear and greed index was temporarily reported at 54 today, which was lower than yesterday and was in the neutral range; the comprehensive long-short ratio was 0.9, and bearish sentiment dominated; investors are advised to pay close attention to subsequent capital flows and sentiment changes.

data.title: TRON Ecosystem Cross-Chain Protocol BTTC 2.0 Upgrade, to Launch Revenue Sharing Model
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, BTTC 2.0, the core cross-chain protocol of TRON ecosystem, is about to introduce an innovative revenue sharing model. BTTC 2.0 supports multi-address joint staking, joint node construction, and flexible revenue distribution through the validator cooperation mechanism. All rewards are automatically executed through smart contracts to ensure full transparency and decentralization, eliminating the risk of human manipulation. This upgrade will lay a solid foundation for the sustainable development of the Web3 economic ecology and promote the construction of a fairer and more open blockchain network.

data.title: OSL officially announces support for mETH custody
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: OSL, Asia's first digital asset custodian licensed and insured by the Hong Kong Securities and Futures Commission (SFC), officially announced its support for the custody of mETH. This move reflects the expansion of the mETH protocol to regulated financial infrastructure and is a milestone towards institutional-level custody.

data.title: Protecting Your Binance Account: Avoiding Face and QR Code Scams
data.description:
Binance Blog published a new article, highlighting the increasing threat of scams targeting Binance users through fake face verification and QR code traps. These scams are designed to deceive users into granting access to their accounts, posing significant risks to their funds. The article emphasizes the importance of user vigilance and the necessity of using only official Binance communication channels to avoid falling victim to these scams.

Crypto scams are evolving, and scammers are now employing sophisticated tactics to impersonate Binance support. They often request face videos or send QR codes under the guise of account verification or rewards. These scams rely on users trusting the wrong source, leading to potential account takeovers. The article details how these scams operate, with scammers using AI to mimic users or sending QR codes that, when scanned, allow them instant access to the victim's Binance account. The consequences can be severe, with scammers transferring funds before the breach is detected.

The article provides a real-life example of a user named Lisa, who received a QR code via WhatsApp promising Binance rewards. After scanning it, her account was compromised, putting her crypto assets at risk. Fortunately, she managed to freeze her account in time, but the incident underscores the need for caution. Scammers often target users on social media platforms like WhatsApp, Telegram, and Facebook, exploiting their trust in supposed support messages or enticing offers. The article warns that regions with high device theft rates are particularly vulnerable, especially if devices are not secured.

Binance's risk team is actively combating these threats through continuous monitoring and rapid response measures. They track fake support accounts and malicious QR code distributors, shutting them down swiftly. The team also emphasizes that any requests for videos or QR codes will only come from verified sources, such as the Binance app or website. Users are encouraged to report suspicious activities and secure their devices with strong passwords and two-factor authentication.

To protect themselves, users are advised to follow a three-step safety checklist: refuse to send face videos to unverified sources, avoid scanning random QR codes, and secure their devices. The article concludes by reminding users that while Binance's support teams are available 24/7, personal vigilance is the first line of defense. By adhering to these guidelines, users can outsmart scammers and safeguard their crypto assets effectively.

data.title: KuCoin Thailand is officially launched, fully compliant operation
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News KuCoin announced that its first fully compliant local trading platform, KuCoin Thailand, is officially open to Thai users for registration and trading. The platform has obtained regulatory approval from the Securities and Exchange Commission of Thailand (SEC), supports Thai baht deposits and withdrawals, and provides localized, highly secure, and easy-to-operate digital asset services. KuCoin CEO BC Wong said that this is an important step for the company to deepen its strategic layout in Southeast Asia. After registering in India, it once again demonstrated its determination to operate globally in compliance. In 2023, about 13 million Thais will use cryptocurrencies, and the market potential is huge.

data.title: Iran calls for emergency Security Council meeting
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News - Iran's permanent mission to the United Nations sent a letter to the rotating president of the Security Council, requesting an emergency meeting to respond to Israel's blatant aggression against Iran. The letter strongly condemned Israel's aggression against Iran's peaceful nuclear facilities and senior military officials with the support of the United States, and called on the Security Council to hold an emergency meeting immediately and take decisive action against these criminal and provocative acts. The letter stated that Israel has recklessly, illegally and premeditatedly launched a series of attacks on Iran's nuclear facilities and civilian infrastructure. These actions are considered to be a clear violation of the UN Charter and the basic norms of international law, and their dangerous consequences seriously threaten regional and international peace and security. (Jinshi)
